name: grosharp/about-story
title: About Story
description: Two-column editorial — pulled quote left, narrative paragraphs right.

quote.default: Great digital work isn't built on templates. It's crafted on understanding.

p1.default: GroSharp was founded with one belief — that most digital agencies were choosing volume over craft. Every project looked the same, felt the same, and performed the same way: adequately.

p2.default: We decided to work differently. We keep our client roster intentionally small. Every engagement gets our full attention — not a junior team handoff, not a repurposed template, but thinking built around your business from the ground up.

p3.default: Today, GroSharp works with brands across 12+ countries, from early-stage startups to established companies going through a rebrand. The goal is always the same: ship work we're proud of, that performs the way our clients need it to.
